category_sources: source_facts.description says somagic is a Linux capture program for Somagic EasyCAP variants.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is somagic; source_facts.homepage is the archived official easycap-somagic-linux project.
docs_sources: Official Google Code archive preserves the project's GettingStarted and BuildingKernelModule wiki documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Google Code archive; its archived source browser is the official source-control surface for the project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify Somagic EasyCAP capture, initialization, and command-line tools.
